testcase.name: TC-IMAGES: Page Load and Layout › TC-IMAGES-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to the page, Then correct URL
TC-IMAGES: Page Load and Layout › TC-IMAGES-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then images / gallery heading is visible
TC-IMAGES: Page Load and Layout › TC-IMAGES-03: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then main landmark is present and non-empty
TC-IMAGES: Page Load and Layout › TC-IMAGES-04: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image count indicator is displayed
TC-IMAGES: Gallery Grid › TC-IMAGES-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image gallery grid renders
TC-IMAGES: Gallery Grid › TC-IMAGES-06: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then empty state message is shown when no images exist
TC-IMAGES: Gallery Grid › TC-IMAGES-07: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then gallery contains multiple thumbnail images
TC-IMAGES: Upload › TC-IMAGES-08: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then upload button is visible
TC-IMAGES: Upload › TC-IMAGES-09: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then file input element exists in the DOM (may be hidden)
TC-IMAGES: Upload › TC-IMAGES-10: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then upload button is enabled
TC-IMAGES: Lightbox / Full-Size View › TC-IMAGES-11: Given the thumbnail is present, When I click the thumbnail, Then it opens the lightbox or full view
TC-IMAGES: Lightbox / Full-Size View › TC-IMAGES-12: Given I am on the lightbox, When I view it, Then it shows a full-size image
TC-IMAGES: Lightbox / Full-Size View › TC-IMAGES-13: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then lightbox has a close button
TC-IMAGES: Lightbox / Full-Size View › TC-IMAGES-14: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then lightbox close button dismisses the lightbox
TC-IMAGES: Lightbox / Full-Size View › TC-IMAGES-15: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then lightbox has next and previous navigation arrows
TC-IMAGES: Delete Image › TC-IMAGES-16: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then delete or options menu is accessible on an image
TC-IMAGES: Delete Image › TC-IMAGES-17: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then delete option appears in the image context menu
TC-IMAGES: Delete Image › TC-IMAGES-18: Given I am on the delete action, When I view it, Then it shows a confirmation dialog
TC-IMAGES: Metadata, Albums, Download and Share › TC-IMAGES-19: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image metadata (date, size, or album) is shown
TC-IMAGES: Metadata, Albums, Download and Share › TC-IMAGES-20: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then albums section is present when available
TC-IMAGES: Metadata, Albums, Download and Share › TC-IMAGES-21: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then create album button is accessible
TC-IMAGES: Metadata, Albums, Download and Share › TC-IMAGES-22: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then download button is present on an image or in lightbox
TC-IMAGES: Metadata, Albums, Download and Share › TC-IMAGES-23: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then share button is present on an image or in lightbox
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-24: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then checkboxes appear on hover or via select mode
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-25: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows a batch action bar
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-26: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then batch delete button is accessible after selecting images
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-27: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then select-all control is present when multiple images exist
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-28: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page renders without critical console errors on load
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-29: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then keyboard shortcut Escape closes the lightbox
TC-IMAGES: Multi-Select and Batch Operations › TC-IMAGES-30: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then navigating to the next image in lightbox works
TC-IMAGES: Image Editor › TC-IMAGES-31: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image editor opens from lightbox via crop or filter button
TC-IMAGES: Image Editor › TC-IMAGES-32: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then crop button is accessible in editor
TC-IMAGES: Image Caption Edit › TC-IMAGES-33: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image caption edit field is present in lightbox or detail
TC-IMAGES: Image Caption Edit › TC-IMAGES-34: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then caption edit field accepts typed text
TC-IMAGES: Geo-Location Tag › TC-IMAGES-35: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then geo-location tag is visible
TC-IMAGES: Select All Checkbox › TC-IMAGES-36: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then select all images checkbox or button is present
TC-IMAGES: Select All Checkbox › TC-IMAGES-37: Given the page is loaded, When I click select all selects all visible images, Then it responds correctly
TC-IMAGES: Image Sort Options › TC-IMAGES-38: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image sort control is present
TC-IMAGES: Image Sort Options › TC-IMAGES-39: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then sort options include date, size, or name
TC-IMAGES: Image Sort Options › TC-IMAGES-40: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then selecting a sort option updates the gallery order
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to the page, Then correct news URL
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then news heading is visible
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-03: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then main content region is visible
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-04: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then page has no uncaught JS errors on load
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then news feed renders at least one article or card
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-06: Given I am on the article card, When I view it, Then it shows a headline
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-07: Given I am on the article card, When I view it, Then it shows a thumbnail image
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-08: Given I am on the article card, When I view it, Then it shows a source name
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-09: Given I am on the article card, When I view it, Then it shows a publication date or timestamp
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-10: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then multiple article cards are rendered
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-11: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then category tab bar or filter is present
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-12: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then default active tab is visually selected (aria-selected or data-state)
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-13: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then switching to a second category tab changes articles
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-14: Given the page is loaded, When I click Technology category (if present) loads tech articles, Then it responds correctly
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-15: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then active tab is highlighted after switching
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-16: Given the article is present, When I click the article, Then it opens detail or external link
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-17: Given I am on the article detail page, When I view it, Then it shows readable content
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-18: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then back navigation returns to news feed
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-19: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then article source is a clickable link
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-20: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then share button is present on article card
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-21: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then share button opens share menu or dialog
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-22: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bookmark or save button is present
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-23: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then search input is accessible
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-24: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then typing in search returns results or filters feed
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-25: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then clearing search restores default feed
TC-NEWS | Load More / Infinite Scroll › TC-NEWS-26: "Load more" button or infinite scroll is present
TC-NEWS | Load More / Infinite Scroll › TC-NEWS-27: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then scrolling down does not crash the page
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-28: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then breaking news banner renders if present
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-29: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows empty state message
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-30: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page does not throw JS errors on category switch
TC-NEWS | Save and Bookmark Article › TC-NEWS-31: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then save or bookmark button is present on article card
TC-NEWS | Save and Bookmark Article › TC-NEWS-32: Given the page is loaded, When I click bookmark toggles its saved state, Then it responds correctly
TC-NEWS | Personalized Feed Preferences › TC-NEWS-33: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then personalized feed toggle or preferences control is present
TC-NEWS | Reading Time Estimate › TC-NEWS-34: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then reading time estimate is shown on article card
TC-NEWS | Related Articles › TC-NEWS-35: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then related articles section is present on article detail
TC-NEWS | Related Articles › TC-NEWS-36: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then related articles section contains at least one article link
TC-NEWS | Manage Sources › TC-NEWS-37: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then manage sources link is accessible
TC-SHORTS | Page Load › TC-SHORTS-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to the page, Then correct URL

TC-SHORTS | Vertical Video Player › TC-SHORTS-06: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then video element has a valid src or srcObject

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › explore\shorts.spec.js:100:7 › TC-SHORTS | Vertical Video Player › TC-SHORTS-07: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then short video autoplays or a play button is visible
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: false

TC-THEME: Toggle Visibility › TC-THEME-01: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then theme toggle button is visible
TC-THEME: Toggle Visibility › TC-THEME-02: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then toggle has an aria-label
TC-THEME: Theme Switching › TC-THEME-03: Given the the toggle is present, When I click the the toggle, Then it changes the theme token on html element
TC-THEME: Theme Switching › TC-THEME-04: html element carries "dark" or "light" class or data-theme
TC-THEME: Theme Switching › TC-THEME-05: Given the page is loaded, When I click toggle switches dark to light or light to dark, Then it responds correctly
TC-THEME: Theme Switching › TC-THEME-06: Given the page is loaded, When I click toggle twice returns to the original theme, Then it responds correctly
TC-THEME: Theme Persistence › TC-THEME-07: Given I am on the page, When I reload the page, Then content remains intact
TC-THEME: Theme Persistence › TC-THEME-08: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then theme persists when navigating to another page
TC-THEME: Theme Persistence › TC-THEME-09: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then theme is applied before first paint (no flash of wrong theme)
TC-THEME: Keyboard Accessibility › TC-THEME-10: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then toggle is reachable via Tab key
TC-THEME: Keyboard Accessibility › TC-THEME-11: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then pressing Enter on focused toggle changes the theme
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › features\theme.spec.js:161:7 › TC-THEME: Keyboard Accessibility › TC-THEME-11: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then pressing Enter on focused toggle changes the theme
Error: expect(received).not.toEqual(expected) // deep equality
Expected: not "text-medium"
167 | await page.waitForTimeout(600); 168 | const after = await getTheme(page); > 169 | expect(before).not.toEqual(after); | ^ 170 | }); 171 | }); 172 | at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\features\theme.spec.js:169:24

testcase.name: TC-THEME: System Preference and Settings Consistency › TC-THEME-12: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then system preference / auto option is present if supported
TC-THEME: System Preference and Settings Consistency › TC-THEME-13: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then settings page has a theme selector
TC-THEME: System Preference and Settings Consistency › TC-THEME-14: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then settings theme selector reflects the current active theme

TC-THEME: System Preference and Settings Consistency › TC-THEME-15: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then theme toggle button is also visible on the notifications page
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-01: comment section opens after clicking comment button
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-02: comment input field is visible and editable
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-03: typing in comment input reflects the text
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-04: comment submit button enables when text is entered
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-05: submitting a comment clears the input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-06: submitted comment appears in the comment thread
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-07: existing comments are visible in the comment section
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-08: comment section shows comment count
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-09: reply button is present on individual comments
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-10: clicking Reply on a comment opens a reply input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-11: own comment has a delete option
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-12: like button is present on comments
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-01: hovering the like button reveals a reaction picker
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-02: reaction picker contains multiple distinct reaction options
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-03: clicking a reaction registers it and updates button state
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-04: reaction count is visible on posts
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-05: clicking reaction count opens the reactions list viewer
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-06: clicking the active reaction again removes it (toggle)
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-01: clicking on post content navigates to post detail page
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-02: post detail page shows the post content
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-03: post detail page has a comment section
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-04: post detail page shows like and share buttons
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-05: post detail shows the author's name and avatar
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-06: back navigation from detail returns to home feed
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-07: post timestamp is shown on the detail page
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-01: share button is present on feed post cards
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-02: clicking share opens a share options panel or dialog
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-03: share panel contains a copy link option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-04: share panel has a repost or share to feed option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-05: share panel can be dismissed with Escape
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-06: share panel has a send via message option
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-01: long posts show a "See more" or "Read more" button
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-02: clicking "See more" expands the full post text
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-03: expanded post shows a "See less" button
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-04: clicking "See less" re-truncates the post
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-01: bookmark or save button is present on post cards
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-02: clicking bookmark saves the post and updates button state
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-03: bookmark button in post 3-dot menu is accessible
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-04: saved posts are accessible from profile or saved section
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-01: feed tabs are visible if present (For You / Following / Latest)
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-02: active tab is visually distinguished
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-03: clicking an inactive tab switches feed content
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-04: switching tabs does not break the page or throw errors
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-01: hashtags in posts are rendered as clickable links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-02: clicking a hashtag navigates to the hashtag or explore page
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-03: @mentions in posts are rendered as clickable profile links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-04: clicking an @mention navigates to that user's profile
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-01: scrolling to bottom triggers a loading indicator
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-02: more posts load after scrolling to bottom
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-03: page does not crash during repeated scrolling
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-04: back-to-top button appears after scrolling down
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-05: feed items are not duplicated after pagination
TC-NAV-001 Direct Deep Links › TC-NAV-001: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 01 direct goto /app/home loads with main content
TC-NAV-001 Direct Deep Links › TC-NAV-001: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 02 direct goto /app/notifications loads with main content

TC-NAV-003 Active Nav Highlight › TC-NAV-003: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 02 on /app/notifications the Notifications nav link is active

TC-NAV-003 Active Nav Highlight › TC-NAV-003: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 05 active indicator changes when navigating between pages
TC-NAV-004 Cross-Module Actions › TC-NAV-004: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 01 clicking a user avatar in feed navigates to their profile
TC-NAV-004 Cross-Module Actions › TC-NAV-004: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 02 clicking a notification navigates away from the notifications list
TC-NAV-004 Cross-Module Actions › TC-NAV-004: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 03 clicking a post in the profile feed navigates to post detail
TC-NAV-004 Cross-Module Actions › TC-NAV-004: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then 04 clicking Home in nav from any page returns to /app/home
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-01: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then profile page loads with correct URL pattern
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then profile display name is visible
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-03: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then profile avatar is rendered with a valid image src
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-04: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then cover photo or banner area is present
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bio or about text is shown if set

error.message: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook.

testcase.error: [chromium] › profile\profile.spec.js:84:7 › Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bio or about text is shown if set Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook. 46 | 47 | test.describe('Page Load and Profile Header', () => { > 48 | test.beforeEach(async ({ page }) => { await goOwnProfile(page); }); | ^ 49 | 50 | test('TC-PROFILE-01: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then profile page loads with correct URL pattern', async ({ page }) => { 51 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/app\/profile\//); at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\profile\profile.spec.js:48:8 Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('a[href*="/app/profile"]').first() - locator resolved to … - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 50 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms 21 | const profileLink = page.locator('a[href*="/app/profile"]').first(); 22 | if (await profileLink.isVisible({ timeout: 5000 }).catch(() => false)) { > 23 | await profileLink.click(); | ^ 24 | await page.waitForURL(/\/app\/profile\//, { timeout: 10000 }).catch(() => {}); 25 | } else { 26 | await page.goto(`${BASE_URL}/app/profile`, { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }); at goOwnProfile (C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\profile\profile.spec.js:23:23) at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\profile\profile.spec.js:48:41 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_15-50-29\artifacts\profile-profile-Page-Load--98493--about-text-is-shown-if-set-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_15-50-29\artifacts\profile-profile-Page-Load--98493--about-text-is-shown-if-set-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-13_15-50-29\artifacts\profile-profile-Page-Load--98493--about-text-is-shown-if-set-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-06: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then profile page does not have uncaught JS errors
Profile Stats › TC-PROFILE-07: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then follower count is visible
Profile Stats › TC-PROFILE-08: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then following count is visible
Profile Stats › TC-PROFILE-09: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then post count is visible
Profile Stats › TC-PROFILE-10: Given the followers count is present, When I click the followers count, Then it opens the followers list
Profile Stats › TC-PROFILE-11: Given the following count is present, When I click the following count, Then it opens the following list
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-12: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then profile content tabs are present
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-13: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Posts tab is visible
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-14: Given the page is loaded, When I click Photos tab loads photo grid, Then it responds correctly
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-15: Given the About tab is present, When I click the About tab, Then it shows profile info section
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-16: Given the Friends tab is present, When I click the Friends tab, Then it shows friends list
Profile Tabs › TC-PROFILE-17: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then active tab indicator updates when switching tabs
Posts Tab › TC-PROFILE-18: Given I am on the posts tab, When I view it, Then it shows the user's posts or empty state
Posts Tab › TC-PROFILE-19: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then own post on profile has an edit option
Posts Tab › TC-PROFILE-20: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then own post on profile has a delete option
Posts Tab › TC-PROFILE-21: Given I am on the post cards on profile, When I view it, Then it shows like and comment buttons
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-22: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Edit Profile button is visible
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-23: Given the Edit Profile is present, When I click the Edit Profile, Then it opens an edit form or modal
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-24: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then edit form has a name field pre-filled with current name
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-25: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then edit form has a bio field
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-26: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then edit form has a Save button
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-27: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then edit form can be dismissed without saving
Edit Profile › TC-PROFILE-28: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then edit form has an avatar upload option
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-29: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows Follow or Add Friend button
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-30: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Follow button changes state after clicking
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-31: Given I am on the other user profile, When I view it, Then it shows a Message button
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-32: Given the Message on other profile is present, When I click the Message on other profile, Then it opens a message thread
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-33: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then other user profile 3-dot menu has block and report options
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-34: Given I am on the own profile does not, When I view it, Then it shows Follow or Add Friend button
Other User Profile › TC-PROFILE-35: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then mutual friends count is shown on another user's profile
Block and Report › TC-PROFILE-36: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then block option is present in 3-dot menu on another user profile
Block and Report › TC-PROFILE-37: Given the block is present, When I click the block, Then it opens a confirmation dialog
Block and Report › TC-PROFILE-38: Given I am on the blocked user profile, When I view it, Then it shows a blocked state indicator
Block and Report › TC-PROFILE-39: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then report option in 3-dot menu opens a report form
Block and Report › TC-PROFILE-40: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then report form has selectable report categories

Profile Sharing › TC-PROFILE-43: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then profile URL in the browser is a valid shareable link

Input Sanitisation › TC-SEC-001: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then post input does not execute injected script tag
Input Sanitisation › TC-SEC-002: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then comment input does not execute injected script tag
Input Sanitisation › TC-SEC-003: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bio field in profile edit does not execute injected script tag

Input Sanitisation › TC-SEC-005: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then search input does not execute injected script tag

Auth Protection › TC-SEC-009: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then unauthenticated access to /app/profile redirects to login
Content Security › TC-SEC-010: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then script count does not increase after loading feed content
Content Security › TC-SEC-011: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then images in feed load from https origins (no mixed content)
Content Security › TC-SEC-012: Given the page is loaded, When I inspect it, Then no mixed-content console errors on home page load
Session Security › TC-SEC-013: Given I am logged in, When I log out, Then session cookie is cleared
Session Security › TC-SEC-014: Given I am logged in, When I log out, Then redirects to login
Session Security › TC-SEC-015: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then login page does not expose credentials in URL

Page Load and Layout › TC-GROUPS-05: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then sidebar or left-panel navigation is visible
